item.title: Commandline Calculator
item.description: A high-performance command-line calculator built with Rust, supporting complex mathematical expressions and unit conversions.

item.title: Dukani
item.description: An e-commerce platform prototype focused on providing local businesses with easy-to-use digital tools for sales and inventory tracking.

item.title: Jikoni
item.description: A kitchen management application that helps track inventory, suggest recipes based on available ingredients, and manage shopping lists.

item.title: Sirbor
item.description: The codebase for this very blog! Built using Quartz and customized to reflect my journey and interest in technology.

item.title: TodoApp
item.description: A minimalistic yet powerful todo application with focus on productivity, offline-first capabilities, and cross-device sync.

item.title: iFogSim
item.description: A simulation framework for Fog computing environments, allowing for the modeling of IoT networks and edge-to-cloud data flows.

item.title: Agentic Workflows
item.description: Discussion on common patterns in AI agents: ReAct (Reasoning and Acting), Reflection, and Planning. How to build more autonomous systems.

item.title: Data Lakehouse Architecture
item.description: The evolution from Data Warehouses and Data Lakes to Lakehouses (Delta Lake, Iceberg). ACID transactions on the lake.

item.title: dbt Best Practices
item.description: Best practices for organizing dbt models, using macros, and ensuring data quality through tests and documentation.

item.title: Role of Feature Stores
item.description: How feature stores like Feast and Tecton simplify the path from data engineering to model training and serving in production.
